caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is in a room that appears to be a store or studio, featuring a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt, clothing racks in the background, and framed photos on the wall. Red and white logos are visible in the lower corners of the frame, including one that reads "Boutique Kelly". Across the sequence, the man talks and gestures; in the second frame, he raises his left hand. He remains seated in the same position throughout, with his facial expression shifting as he speaks. The background and equipment, including the microphone and the mannequin, stay static while the man's movements provide the only action.
